headline: ERIE Q1 Deep Dive: Margin Recovery Amid Competitive Headwinds, Tech Modernization Advances
summary: Insurance management company Erie Indemnity (NASDAQ:ERIE) posted $1.01 billion of revenue in Q1 CY2026, up 2.3% year on year. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.90 per share was 5.3% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
